title: Marinellia cristata
taxonomy: Marinellia cristata is a species of flowering plant in the family Melastomataceae. The family Melastomataceae is a group of flowering plants commonly known as the "membracaceous" or "merremiaceous" family. This family comprises approximately 170 genera and 5,000 species of flowering plants, primarily found in the tropics and subtropics. Marinellia cristata is native to Madagascar and is characterized by its unique and delicate appearance. The classification of Marinellia cristata reflects its evolutionary history and relationships with other plant species within the Melastomataceae family.
